# fleetdm_team (Data Source)

Retrieves information about a FleetDM team.

## Example Usage

```hcl
data "fleetdm_team" "workstations" {
  id = 1
}

output "team_name" {
  value = data.fleetdm_team.workstations.name
}
```

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Get a specific team by ID
data "fleetdm_team" "workstations" {
  id = 1
}

# Use team data in other resources
output "team_name" {
  value = data.fleetdm_team.workstations.name
}

output "team_host_count" {
  value = data.fleetdm_team.workstations.host_count
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) The unique identifier of the team.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) A description of the team.
- `enable_disk_encryption` (Boolean) Whether disk encryption is enforced for hosts in this team.
- `host_count` (Number) The number of hosts in the team.
- `host_expiry_enabled` (Boolean) Whether host expiry is enabled for this team.
- `host_expiry_window` (Number) The number of days after which hosts are considered expired.
- `name` (String) The name of the team.
- `user_count` (Number) The number of users in the team.
